decision_rationale: No result meets any threshold (kw>=2, sem>=0.7, or func>=0.7). Topological-attention papers share only generic topology framing; MoH and MLA/GLA touch multi-head dissemination weakly. Per program_v5.md total_hits==0 → PASS. NOTE: primary scored 8 hits at sem 0.74-0.90 / func 0.74-0.90 on TDA-attention + multi-head sparse adjacencies; verdict-level disagreement flagged (Pattern E).
